name: freelancekit
description: FreelanceKit — Claude Code skills for the freelance admin grind: invoices, proposals, contracts, outreach, rate math. Free /invoice skill included; the full 7-skill pack is at freelancekit.tools.

plugins.name: freelancekit
plugins.description: Turn a plain-English description of freelance work into a clean, client-ready invoice (HTML + Markdown), right in Claude Code — the free skill from FreelanceKit. The full pack adds proposals, contract red-flagging, cold outreach, scope-checks and rate math: https://freelancekit.tools
